const identity = value => value;
const numberIdentity = identity(1);
const stringIdentity = identity("sea");

const shadowed = value => value;
const beforeShadow = shadowed(true);
{
    const shadowed = value => ({ value });
    const insideShadow = shadowed("inner");
    insideShadow.value;
}
const afterShadow = shadowed(2);

const occursCheck = value => value(value);

let mutableIdentity = value => value;
const firstMutable = mutableIdentity(1);
const secondMutable = mutableIdentity("two");

const mutableRecord = { map: value => value };
const firstRecord = mutableRecord.map(1);
const secondRecord = mutableRecord.map("two");

const annotationWins: string = 1;
const validUnknown: unknown = 1;
const explicitEscape: any = 1;

type Fancy<T> = {
    [K in keyof T as `get${Capitalize<string & K>}`]: () => T[K];
};
declare const fancy: Fancy<{ readonly name: string }>;
const unsupportedButTyped = fancy.getName?.();

void numberIdentity;
void stringIdentity;
void beforeShadow;
void afterShadow;
void occursCheck;
void firstMutable;
void secondMutable;
void firstRecord;
void secondRecord;
void annotationWins;
void validUnknown;
void explicitEscape;
void unsupportedButTyped;
